title: Classic Cotton T-Shirt
content: Premium quality 100% organic cotton t-shirt. Comfortable fit for everyday wear. Machine washable.

title: Slim Fit Jeans
content: Modern slim fit jeans with stretch denim. Mid-rise waist, five-pocket styling. Available in multiple washes.

title: Wool Blend Sweater
content: Luxurious wool blend sweater for cold weather. Ribbed cuffs and hem. Crew neck design.

title: Leather Crossbody Bag
content: Handcrafted genuine leather crossbody bag. Adjustable strap, multiple compartments. Perfect for daily use.

title: Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds
content: High-quality wireless earbuds with noise cancellation. 8 hours battery life. IPX5 water resistant. USB-C charging case included.

title: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
content: Double-wall vacuum insulated water bottle. Keeps drinks cold 24h or hot 12h. BPA-free. 750ml capacity.

title: Yoga Mat Premium
content: Extra thick 6mm yoga mat with non-slip surface. Eco-friendly TPE material. Includes carrying strap.

title: Organic Green Tea Set
content: Premium Japanese green tea collection. Includes Matcha, Sencha, and Genmaicha. 100g each. Ceremonial grade.

title: Mechanical Keyboard RGB
content: Hot-swappable mechanical keyboard with per-key RGB. Gateron switches. USB-C, PBT keycaps. Full NKRO.

title: Running Shoes Pro
content: Lightweight performance running shoes with carbon plate. Responsive foam midsole. Breathable mesh upper.

title: Cast Iron Skillet
content: Pre-seasoned 12-inch cast iron skillet. Oven safe to 500F. Even heat distribution. Lifetime durability.

title: Scented Candle Collection
content: Set of 3 hand-poured soy wax candles. Vanilla, Lavender, and Sandalwood. 40h burn time each.

title: Denim Jacket Classic
content: Timeless denim jacket with button front. Chest pockets. Slightly oversized fit. Medium wash.

title: Smart LED Desk Lamp
content: Adjustable LED desk lamp with wireless charging base. 5 brightness levels, 3 color temps. Touch control.
